World Models for Robotics & Embodied AI.description: From Ha & Schmidhuber's original World Models through latent dynamics learning (Dreamer series), model-based planning (MuZero, TD-MPC), transformer world models (IRIS), to large-scale generative video world simulators (Cosmos, Genie, SORA) — the evolution of learned world models for embodied intelligence.
